contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Docs: index capoeira + tribomirimbahia repos + READMEs after the split
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/110
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tribomirimbahia/pull/4
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/6
  
  Details:
  Documentation pass following the capoeira/tribomirimbahia repo split. Three PRs:
  
  1. TrueSightDAO/capoeira#6 — README fix. mirim-bahia.truesight.me actually
     deploys from tribomirimbahia (not truesight_me as the old related-repos
     table said). Also fixed agroverse_shop URL pointing at wrong org and
     added a "Deploys to" column for the repo→domain map.
  
  2. TrueSightDAO/tribomirimbahia#4 — added README.md (repo had none). Frames
     it as the ledger & transparency layer, points to capoeira for practice
     content, includes the data-flow diagram (Stripe → Sheet → treasury-cache
     JSON → this site), conventions, and links to related repos with deploy
     targets.
  
  3. TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context#110 — indexed both repos so future
     agents land on the right one:
     - PROJECT_INDEX.md: capoeira + tribomirimbahia rows added under
       DAO/Agroverse with full pipeline context, 209-raw-clips warning,
       OAuth-reuse note, transparency-explorer treasury-cache flow.
     - WORKSPACE_CONTEXT.md §6 (production domains): capoeira.agroverse.shop
       and mirim-bahia.truesight.me with disambiguation notes.
     - WORKSPACE_CONTEXT.md §7 (repo locations): capoeira/, tribomirimbahia/,
       and treasury-cache/ clone URLs + deploy targets.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
